protocols.Paper_title: Efficacy Validation of SARS-CoV-2-Inactivation and Viral Genome Stability in Saliva by a Guanidine Hydrochloride and Surfactant-Based Virus Lysis/Transport Buffer
protocols.Evidence: Prep Buffer A contains 6.0 M GuHCl and 1.5% Hexa-DTMC; mixtures loaded into Pierce Detergent Removal Spin Columns; incubated at 25 C

protocols.Paper_title: Efficacy Validation of SARS-CoV-2-Inactivation and Viral Genome Stability in Saliva by a Guanidine Hydrochloride and Surfactant-Based Virus Lysis/Transport Buffer
protocols.Evidence: virus lysis/transport buffer for viral RNA containing GuHCl and a surfactant; samples stored at 35/4/4 C; analyzed by real-time RT-PCR
